test.name: Carrinho mostra produto correto - Calsa Jeans

kw.name: Dado que acesso o site demowebshop
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Browser Implicit Wait
kw.doc: Sets the implicit wait value used by Selenium.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Entao sou direcionado para a pagina principal
Element Attribute Value Should Be
kw.msg: Element 'css=img[alt="Tricentis Demo Web Shop"]' attribute 'alt' contains value 'Tricentis Demo Web Shop'.
kw.doc: Verifies element identified by ``locator`` contains expected attribute value.

kw.name: Quando clico no item Apparel & Shoes
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Entao sou direcionado para a pagina de produtos
Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'css=h1' contains exact text 'Apparel & Shoes'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Então sou direcionado para a pagina do produto
Element Attribute Value Should Be
kw.msg: Element 'id=main-product-img-36' attribute 'alt' contains value 'Picture of Blue Jeans'.
kw.doc: Verifies element identified by ``locator`` contains expected attribute value.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Quando clico em adicionar no carrinho
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Entao visualizo o numero de itens no carrinho
Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` contains ``text``.

kw.name: Quando clico no icone do carrinho
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Entao sou direcionado para a pagina do carrinho
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'css=h1' contains exact text 'Shopping cart'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: E confirmo se a descrição do produto no carrinho esta correta
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'css=a.product-name' contains exact text 'Blue Jeans'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: E clico em Atualizar Carrinho de Compras
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Entao sou direcionado para a pagina Carrinho de Compras
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'css=h1' contains exact text 'Shopping cart'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
